text: The environment around me is both sterile and vibrant at once—sterile in its glass, steel, and concrete, while vibrant through the colorful wall and visually engaging "R+D" display. I feel a sense of curiosity and slight anticipation, as if on the threshold of discovery. The interplay of research and development suggested by the display makes me ponder humanity’s perpetual drive to understand and innovate. I feel inspired to reflect on the relationship between knowledge, exploration, and progress.
